text:
Emanuel Haupt wrote:
 > Unfortunately it fails under 10.0 amd64 with clang and gcc.

Oh ...  I'm sorry for that.  Unfortunately I don't run any
10.0 machines, so I can't easily investigate.  :-(

I'll try to set up a 10.0 VM when I have some free time, but
that won't be very soon, I'm afraid.  If someone else can look
into this, that would be great.

(It runs perfectly fine on my stable/9 amd64 machines, FWIW.)

Best regards
   Oliver
